name: Speedy Cash
description_short: El Cajon, CA Speedy Cash at 380 Broadway Suite 103 provides fast payday and title loans to local residents.
description_long:
Speedy Cash operates at 380 Broadway Suite 103 in El Cajon, CA, in a convenient standalone location within downtown El Cajon. The storefront is easily accessible to El Cajon residents and the surrounding area. Operating hours are Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM; the store is closed on Sundays.

This El Cajon Speedy Cash location specializes in payday loans and title-based loans designed for short-term financial needs. The team can be reached at 619-447-4547 to discuss loan options, answer eligibility questions, and explain repayment terms. Whether you need cash for an unexpected expense or have a specific financial situation, the staff at this CA location are available to help.

When visiting this El Cajon location, bring a valid photo ID, recent pay stubs or proof of income, and access to a checking account for deposit. Title loans require a clear vehicle title. Speedy Cash serves El Cajon and surrounding CA communities with competitive rates and transparent lending practices.
pros: Offers loans up to $4,000 through title loans and lines of credit for larger emergency needs beyond payday loans
Multiple nearby locations in Memphis area (9 stores listed) providing physical access and local service
Extended operating hours including evening (until 7pm weekdays) and Saturday availability (9am-4pm)
Bilingual customer service in English and Spanish with dedicated phone lines
Transparent disclosure that borrowers will know exact loan costs before signing agreements
In-store application process allows real-time questions and document review before commitment
Supplementary money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) reduce need for multiple vendors
cons: No APR or interest rate information disclosed on website, preventing informed rate comparison before visiting
Payday loans typically carry 400%+ APR industry-wide, creating high-cost debt and roll-over risk
Title loans require vehicle lien and collateral, risking loss of transportation for low-income borrowers
Loan amounts capped at $425 for payday products, insufficient for many emergency expenses
No mention of alternatives, credit counseling, or safeguards against predatory lending practices
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs and next paycheck expected within 2 weeks
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency amounts ($2,000-$4,000) who can secure title loan approval
Spanish-language speakers seeking bilingual loan application and customer service support
Customers who prefer in-person application experience with opportunity to ask questions before commitment
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who have steady employment income and cannot access traditional bank loans quickly. Critical caveat: payday and title loans are extremely high-cost products (typically 400%+ APR) designed for short-term use only; they frequently trap borrowers in debt cycles through roll-overs and should be considered only as last resorts before exploring nonprofits, credit unions, employer advances, or emergency assistance programs.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card services
Vehicle appraisal for title loan collateral
Loan document review and signing assistance
meta_description: El Cajon, CA Speedy Cash at 380 Broadway Suite 103 offers fast payday and title loans.
